results.rendered_html:
pratyuta ind.
1 On the contrary; kṛtamapi mahopakāraṃ paya iva pītvā nirātaṃkaḥ . pratyuta haṃtuṃ yatate kākodaramodaraḥ khalo jagati  Bv. 1. 76. 
2 Rather, even.
3 On the other hand.
